title: Mexican Prawns Barbacoa
description: A flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring prawns cooked in a rich barbacoa sauce, served with mellow tortillas.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin and chili powder, and cook for 30 seconds.
Add the barbacoa sauce and stir to combine.
Add the prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Stir in lime juice and season with salt.
Warm the mellow tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the dish by placing a few prawns on each tortilla, and serving with additional barbacoa sauce for dipping.
